revision.comment: add notice not to use the template inside cite templates
1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Listed Invalid ISBN/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:qq]][[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects from {{NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Listed Invalid ISBN/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects from {{NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Listed Invalid ISBN/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::qq]][[Category:qq]][[sn::automatic wikipedia redirects from {{NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]][[sn::qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Listed Invalid ISBN/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::11]][[Category:11]][[sn::automatic wikipedia redirects from {{NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:11]][[sn::11]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Listed Invalid ISBN/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::11]][[Category:11]][[sn::automatic wikipedia redirects from {{NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:11]][[sn::11]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Listed Invalid ISBN/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::11]][[sn::automatic wikipedia redirects from {{NAMESPACE}}]][[sn::11]] [[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
